title: dortmanna coronopifolia
intro: Dortmanna coronopifolia, also known as the lesser dodder or yellow dodder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dortmanna coronopifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
